requirement_compliance.title: Project registration via interactive setup
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-001h/e/f passing (3/3). Technical debt: cmdSetup requires a real TTY — non-interactive (piped) use not supported in v1.

requirement_compliance.title: Read and parse .aitri state file per project
CLI terminal dashboard — aitri-hub monitor
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-005e passing (1/3 automated; 2 skipped — E2E/terminal tests require live TTY). Technical debt: ANSI full-screen clear+redraw causes brief flicker on slow terminals.

requirement_compliance.title: Web dashboard — React served via Docker at localhost:3000
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-006h/e/f passing (3/3 unit config tests). E2E Playwright test (TC-006h browser) skipped — requires running Docker container. Technical debt: Docker first-build takes 2–3 min; subsequent runs meet ≤30s requirement.

requirement_compliance.title: Remote project support (GitHub/GitLab URLs)
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-008h/e/f passing (3/3). Clone, pull, and unreachable-remote failure paths all verified with local bare repo as fake remote. No declared debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Consolidated dashboard data file
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-009h/e passing (2/3 automated; 1 skipped — no marker). Integration roundtrip (write→read) and atomic write pattern verified. No declared debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Collection cycle ≤5s for 20 local projects
requirement_compliance.evidence: collectAll() uses Promise.all for parallel collection. No automated benchmark test defined — manual testing required to confirm ≤5s SLA at 20 projects.

requirement_compliance.title: Single unreadable project must not crash the monitor
requirement_compliance.evidence: collectOne() is wrapped in try/catch and returns status='unreadable' rather than throwing. TC-008f verifies non-throw contract. No explicit multi-project crash test defined.

requirement_compliance.title: Setup completable in ≤15 minutes without prior knowledge
requirement_compliance.evidence: Setup flow uses ≤5 prompts with inline guidance. No user study or timed test defined — qualitative assessment only.

requirement_compliance.title: CLI works on macOS, Linux, and Windows WSL2 with Node.js 18+
requirement_compliance.evidence: Zero runtime dependencies; uses only Node.js built-in modules. Tested on macOS only in CI. Cross-platform verification on Linux and WSL2 not automated.

requirement_compliance.title: No project data transmitted outside local machine
requirement_compliance.evidence: Architecture uses local file I/O only. Remote projects use git clone/pull (intentional, user-registered). No network traffic analysis test defined.

technical_debt_inherited.substitution: Docker image requires `docker build` on first use (2–3 min) before `docker compose up` achieves sub-30s startup; subsequent runs use cached layers and meet the 30s requirement
technical_debt_inherited.reason: ADR-04 chose pre-built bundle; npm pack cannot include a pre-built Docker image; build must happen on user's machine

technical_debt_inherited.substitution: CLI monitor `cmdMonitor` uses `setInterval` with full screen clear+redraw (ANSI ESC[2J) instead of partial row updates; causes brief flicker on slow terminals
technical_debt_inherited.reason: ADR-02 chose full redraw for simplicity; partial update requires cursor positioning state machine which is out of scope for v1

technical_debt_inherited.substitution: `cmdSetup` uses Node.js `readline.createInterface` which requires a real TTY; it does not support non-interactive (piped) setup — users must run it interactively
technical_debt_inherited.reason: Non-interactive setup (e.g. via config file) was not in the IDEA.md requirements for v1; ≤5 prompts constraint implies human interaction
